in / Zumy What is Zumy? Zumy is a small scale tracked mobile robot build design for quick-build from mostly off-the-shelf components. The robot has both and mbed microcontroller board and an ODROID full Linux computer on board. Target applications ar

ll Linux computer on board. Target applications are mobile computer vision and multi-robot coordination. The only custom part in the robot is one PCB that is a carrier for several off-the-shelf modules. Soldering is required. (If you would like to bu

s. Soldering is required. (If you would like to build a Zumy, contact the Biomimetic Millisystems Lab and we can probably supply one of these unpopulated boards.) Running a Zumy Follow these tutorials to get Zumy robots running with ROS. Powering a Z
